summary.en: Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) installed in the US must obtain a system-level safety listing to UL 9540 (Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment) from a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL). UL 9540 covers the complete ESS assembly including batteries, power conversion, and controls. Most Authorities Having Jurisdiction (AHJs) and the National Electrical Code (NEC Article 706) require the UL 9540 listing before permitting installation.
summary.zh: 在美国安装的电池储能系统（BESS）须经由国家认可检测实验室（NRTL）对整套系统进行UL 9540（储能系统及设备标准）系统级安全认证。UL 9540涵盖包括电池、功率变换及控制在内的完整ESS组件。大多数有管辖权的当局（AHJ）及美国国家电气规范（NEC第706条）均要求在获准安装前取得UL 9540认证。
summary.zht: 在美國安裝的電池儲能系統（BESS）須經由國家認可檢測實驗室（NRTL）對整套系統進行UL 9540（儲能系統及設備標準）系統級安全認證。UL 9540涵蓋包括電池、功率轉換及控制在內的完整ESS組件。大多數有管轄權的當局（AHJ）及美國國家電氣規範（NEC第706條）均要求在獲准安裝前取得UL 9540認證。

standards_or_laws: UL 9540 — Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment (NRTL system-level listing)

summary.en: China requires lithium-based stationary storage batteries to comply with GB 36276 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Battery for Electrical Energy Storage) at the cell/module level, and GB/T 36558 for grid-connected ESS general technical requirements. These national standards are assessed by CQC or other CNAS-accredited labs; however, Chinese GB test reports and certificates are not accepted as substitutes for UL 9540 NRTL listing by US AHJs.
summary.zh: 中国要求固定式锂电储能电池符合GB 36276（电力储能用锂离子蓄电池安全要求，电芯/模组级）及GB/T 36558（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）。相关认证由CQC或其他CNAS认可实验室评定；但中国GB检测报告及证书不被美国AHJ接受为UL 9540 NRTL认证的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國要求固定式鋰電儲能電池符合GB 36276（電力儲能用鋰離子蓄電池安全要求，電芯/模組級）及GB/T 36558（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）。相關認證由CQC或其他CNAS認可實驗室評定；但中國GB檢測報告及證書不被美國AHJ接受為UL 9540 NRTL認證的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子蓄电池 (Safety requirements for lithium-ion battery for electrical energy storage)
GB/T 36558-2022 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems)

gap.en: UL 9540 mandates a system-level NRTL listing of the complete ESS as installed; Chinese GB 36276 and GB/T 36558 certifications cover cell/module or system performance but are not NRTL listings and are not accepted by US AHJs or NEC inspectors. Chinese-certified BESS exported to the US must undergo full UL 9540 system-listing testing at an OSHA-recognized NRTL (e.g., UL, Intertek, TUV SUD). No mutual recognition agreement exists between US NRTL and Chinese certification bodies for this scope.
gap.zh: UL 9540要求对已安装的完整ESS进行系统级NRTL认证；中国GB 36276及GB/T 36558认证涵盖电芯/模组或系统性能，但均非NRTL认证，不被美国AHJ或NEC检查员接受。出口美国的中国认证BESS须在OSHA认可的NRTL（如UL、Intertek、TUV SUD）完成完整的UL 9540系统认证测试。目前美国NRTL与中国认证机构之间在此范围内不存在互认协议。
gap.zht: UL 9540要求對已安裝的完整ESS進行系統級NRTL認證；中國GB 36276及GB/T 36558認證涵蓋電芯/模組或系統性能，但均非NRTL認證，不被美國AHJ或NEC檢查員接受。出口美國的中國認證BESS須在OSHA認可的NRTL（如UL、Intertek、TUV SUD）完成完整的UL 9540系統認證測試。目前美國NRTL與中國認證機構之間在此範圍內不存在互認協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (required by most AHJs and NEC Article 706 for permitted BESS installation in the US)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market (GB 36276 mandatory safety standard per SAC); GB/T 36558 is recommended/referenced standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A BESS product certified only to Chinese GB standards cannot be legally installed in most US jurisdictions without obtaining a UL 9540 system-level NRTL listing. This listing must be obtained through an OSHA-recognized NRTL and cannot be substituted by GB 36276 or GB/T 36558 certificates.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅取得中国GB标准认证的BESS产品，在未获得UL 9540系统级NRTL认证的情况下，无法在美国大多数司法管辖区合法安装。该认证须通过OSHA认可的NRTL取得，不可由GB 36276或GB/T 36558证书替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅取得中國GB標準認證的BESS產品，在未獲得UL 9540系統級NRTL認證的情況下，無法在美國大多數司法管轄區合法安裝。該認證須通過OSHA認可的NRTL取得，不可由GB 36276或GB/T 36558證書替代。

requirement_topic.zh: 火灾蔓延危害缓解 — UL 9540A
requirement_topic.zht: 火災蔓延危害緩解 — UL 9540A

summary.en: UL 9540A (Standard Method of Test for the Evaluation of Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems) is a fire test method referenced within UL 9540 and required by many AHJs, fire marshals, and NFPA 855 to evaluate whether thermal runaway in one cell or module propagates to adjacent units. Test results inform minimum separation distances and suppression system design. While UL 9540A is a test method (not a listing standard), UL 9540 system listings increasingly require UL 9540A test data as supporting evidence.
summary.zh: UL 9540A（电池储能系统热失控火灾蔓延评估标准测试方法）是UL 9540内引用的火灾测试方法，也是许多AHJ、消防检察官及NFPA 855所要求的，用于评估单个电芯或模组发生热失控时是否会蔓延至相邻单元。测试结果用于确定最小间距及灭火系统设计要求。尽管UL 9540A为测试方法标准（非认证标准），但UL 9540系统认证日益要求提供UL 9540A测试数据作为佐证。
summary.zht: UL 9540A（電池儲能系統熱失控火災蔓延評估標準測試方法）是UL 9540內引用的火災測試方法，也是許多AHJ、消防檢察官及NFPA 855所要求的，用於評估單個電芯或模組發生熱失控時是否會蔓延至相鄰單元。測試結果用於確定最小間距及滅火系統設計要求。儘管UL 9540A為測試方法標準（非認證標準），但UL 9540系統認證日益要求提供UL 9540A測試數據作為佐證。

standards_or_laws: UL 9540A — Standard Method of Test for the Evaluation of Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems
NFPA 855-2023 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (references UL 9540A data for separation distances)
IFC 2021 Section 1207 — International Fire Code ESS requirements (references NFPA 855)

summary.en: China addresses thermal runaway propagation primarily through GB 38031 (Safety Requirements for Traction Battery of Electric Vehicle) at the cell level (a mandatory thermal propagation test exists for EV batteries) and through GB 36276 for stationary storage batteries. However, neither GB 36276 nor GB 38031 includes a system-level fire propagation test equivalent to UL 9540A. China's GB/T 42288-2022 (Safety Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Station) includes some fire safety provisions but does not replicate the UL 9540A four-level (cell, module, unit, installation) propagation methodology. [UNVERIFIED: exact scope of GB/T 42288-2022 fire propagation provisions]
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 38031（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求，电芯级强制热蔓延测试）及GB 36276（固定储能锂电池）应对热失控蔓延问题。然而，GB 36276与GB 38031均不包含与UL 9540A等效的系统级火灾蔓延测试。中国GB/T 42288-2022（电化学储能电站安全规程）包含部分消防安全条款，但未复制UL 9540A四层级（电芯、模组、单元、安装现场）蔓延测试方法。[未经核实：GB/T 42288-2022火灾蔓延条款的具体范围]
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 38031（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求，電芯級強制熱蔓延測試）及GB 36276（固定儲能鋰電池）應對熱失控蔓延問題。然而，GB 36276與GB 38031均不包含與UL 9540A等效的系統級火災蔓延測試。中國GB/T 42288-2022（電化學儲能電站安全規程）包含部分消防安全條款，但未複製UL 9540A四層級（電芯、模組、單元、安裝現場）蔓延測試方法。[未經核實：GB/T 42288-2022火災蔓延條款的具體範圍]

standards_or_laws: GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (EV traction battery safety, includes cell-level thermal propagation test — mandatory)
GB 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子蓄电池 (stationary storage, limited thermal runaway provisions)
GB/T 42288-2022 — 电化学储能电站安全规程 [UNVERIFIED scope of fire propagation provisions]

gap.en: UL 9540A requires a four-level fire propagation test (cell → module → unit → installation) that produces data used to determine safe separation distances and suppression requirements under NFPA 855 and IFC. No Chinese national standard replicates this methodology at the system/installation level. Chinese BESS exported to the US must conduct UL 9540A testing (typically at an NRTL or accredited lab) separately from any GB certification already held. GB thermal runaway data from GB 38031 (EV) or GB 36276 (stationary) is not accepted as equivalent by US AHJs or NFPA 855 compliance reviews.
gap.zh: UL 9540A要求进行四层级火灾蔓延测试（电芯→模组→单元→安装现场），测试数据用于根据NFPA 855及IFC确定安全间距和灭火要求。中国国家标准中没有在系统/安装层面复制该测试方法的等效标准。出口美国的中国BESS须在已持有GB认证之外，另行开展UL 9540A测试（通常在NRTL或认可实验室）。来自GB 38031（电动汽车）或GB 36276（固定储能）的热失控数据不被美国AHJ或NFPA 855合规审查接受为等效依据。
gap.zht: UL 9540A要求進行四層級火災蔓延測試（電芯→模組→單元→安裝現場），測試數據用於根據NFPA 855及IFC確定安全間距和滅火要求。中國國家標準中沒有在系統/安裝層面複製該測試方法的等效標準。出口美國的中國BESS須在已持有GB認證之外，另行開展UL 9540A測試（通常在NRTL或認可實驗室）。來自GB 38031（電動汽車）或GB 36276（固定儲能）的熱失控數據不被美國AHJ或NFPA 855合規審查接受為等效依據。

mandatory_status.target: De facto mandatory (required as supporting data for UL 9540 listing and by NFPA 855 / IFC for AHJ permit approval in most US jurisdictions; not a listing standard itself)
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent mandatory at system level; GB 38031 thermal propagation test is mandatory for EV traction batteries only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS manufacturers exporting to the US must conduct UL 9540A fire propagation testing in addition to obtaining a UL 9540 system-level NRTL listing. Existing GB thermal runaway certifications do not satisfy this requirement. Failure to provide UL 9540A test data will typically result in AHJ permit denial or requirement for additional fire suppression infrastructure.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口美国的中国BESS制造商须在取得UL 9540系统级NRTL认证的同时，另行完成UL 9540A火灾蔓延测试。现有GB热失控认证不满足此要求。若未能提供UL 9540A测试数据，通常将导致AHJ拒绝发放许可证，或要求增设额外消防设施。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口美國的中國BESS製造商須在取得UL 9540系統級NRTL認證的同時，另行完成UL 9540A火災蔓延測試。現有GB熱失控認證不滿足此要求。若未能提供UL 9540A測試數據，通常將導致AHJ拒絕發放許可證，或要求增設額外消防設施。
